description: Generate org charts, MCD/ERD data models, and C4 architecture diagrams — pilot OrgGen AI via MCP.
name: ai.orggen/orggen

headers.description: Bearer token. Generate an API key from https://www.orggen.ai/settings (Pro plan required).
headers.name: Authorization

headers.description: Optional. UUID of the project to operate on. If omitted, the key's stored active_project_id is used — set it once via the set_active_project tool and forget. Override per-call by passing this header.
headers.name: X-Project-Id

title: OrgGen AI
